name: Mighty Networks Community Platform API
what_it_does: Mighty Networks creator community platform REST API for coaches, creators, and brands to build and manage branded community platforms with courses, events, memberships, and live streaming in a native mobile app experience. Enables AI agents to manage member onboarding and profile management for community membership automation, handle course creation and module management for educational content automation, access event scheduling and live stream management for community programming automation, retrieve member activity and engagement analytics for community health automation, manage subscription and payment plan configuration for membership monetization automation, handle post and discussion content creation for community engagement automation, access member tagging and segmentation for targeted communication automation, retrieve community discovery and space management for content organization automation, manage native mobile app configuration for branded app automation, and integrate Mighty Networks with Zapier, Stripe, and email platforms for end-to-end creator community automation.
use_cases: Building creator communities from membership management agents
Delivering courses from educational community agents
Running live events from community programming agents
Managing subscriptions from creator monetization agents
not_for: Large-scale public social networks (Mighty Networks is for controlled, paid communities)
Corporate intranet and employee communities (use Microsoft Viva or Workplace from Meta)
Free open-access forums (use Discourse or Reddit)
best_when: A creator, coach, or brand wanting AI agents to automate community member management, course delivery, event scheduling, and subscription management through Mighty Networks' native mobile app community platform.
avoid_when: MIGHTY PRO CUSTOM APP REQUIRES APPLE/GOOGLE APP STORE PROCESS: Mighty Networks Mighty Pro (branded native app) requires Apple App Store and Google Play Store review and approval process; automated community launch with custom branded app must account for 1-2 week app store review timeline; automated launch workflows cannot accelerate app store approval. API ACCESS LIMITED VS FULL PLATFORM CAPABILITIES: Mighty Networks API access is more limited than platform's full UI capabilities; some community management features (custom notifications, advanced automation) may require manual UI configuration rather than API; automated community management workflows must verify API coverage for required operations before committal. MEMBER DATA PORTABILITY FOR COMMUNITY MIGRATION: Mighty Networks member data export and portability has limitations; automated community migration between platforms must verify data export completeness; automated member import from other platforms may encounter format incompatibility with Mighty Networks member object structure.

auth.notes: Mighty Networks uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Palo Alto, California HQ. Founded 2017 by Gina Bianchini and Tim Burke. Backed by Owl Rock Capital, Summit Partners ($50M+ raised). Products: Community platform, courses, events, live streaming, memberships, Mighty Pro (branded native apps). Stripe payment integration. GDPR. Serves creators, coaches, and brands. Competes with Circle, Kajabi, and Thinkific for creator community platforms.

pricing.paid_tiers: The Mighty ($41/mo), Mighty Pro ($360/mo, custom app); + Mighty Networks takes 2% transaction fee on member payments
pricing.notes: Palo Alto CA. Summit Partners backed. Monthly subscription + transaction fee. 14-day trial. Custom app tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; member and content queries throttled; webhooks for member join, payment, and content events

known_agent_gotchas: NETWORK ID REQUIRED IN ALL API REQUESTS: Mighty Networks API is network-scoped; all requests require network ID; automated multi-network management must maintain network ID registry; automated operations without network context return authentication errors

MEMBER INVITATION vs DIRECT ADD FOR AUTOMATED ONBOARDING: Mighty Networks member onboarding via invitation (email invite sent) or direct add (SSO/automated provisioning); automated member onboarding for paid communities must coordinate payment verification with member provisioning; automated direct add without payment verification creates unpaid community members

COURSE COMPLETION TRACKING REQUIRES USER ACTIVITY: Mighty Networks course completion tracking is user-driven (member marks lessons complete); automated completion tracking cannot programmatically mark lessons complete on behalf of users; automated completion-based automation (certificate issuance, next module unlock) must listen for user-triggered completion events via webhook

PAYMENT TRANSACTION FEE FOR AUTOMATED MONETIZATION: Mighty Networks takes 2% transaction fee on member payments; automated community monetization ROI calculations must include Mighty Networks transaction fee in cost model; automated pricing optimization that ignores platform fee creates inaccurate net revenue projections

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VALIDATION REQUIRED: Mighty Networks webhooks include HMAC payload signature; automated event processing must validate signature before member provisioning or payment processing; unverified webhook processing creates security risk from spoofed membership events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Community platform. GDPR. OAuth2. US. Member, course, and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Community platform. GDPR. OAuth2. US. Member, content, and payment data.
